articles.title: Exclusive | White House Warns Staff Not to Place Bets on Prediction Markets Amid Iran War
articles.summary: The White House has reportedly issued internal warnings prohibiting staff from betting on prediction markets related to potential conflict with Iran. The move signals growing official recognition that prediction markets have become influential enough to warrant formal restrictions on government insiders who might possess material non-public information.

articles.title: Bill to make prediction markets illegal in MN clears first Senate Committee
articles.summary: Minnesota's Senate committee just advanced legislation that would ban prediction markets in the state. If it passes, Minnesota could become the first state to explicitly criminalize prediction market participation, potentially setting a precedent for other states to follow suit.

articles.title: 'We have a gambling epidemic': WA AG explains why the state is trying to ban Kalshi and other predictive markets
articles.summary: Washington's Attorney General is pushing to ban Kalshi and other prediction markets, calling them part of a broader "gambling epidemic" plaguing the state. The move signals how regulatory pressure is intensifying nationwide as prediction markets gain mainstream adoption, potentially setting a precedent for other states to follow suit.

articles.title: How Prediction Markets Turned the World Into a Casino
articles.summary: Prediction markets have exploded beyond politics and finance into everything from celebrity deaths to weather patterns, creating a global betting ecosystem where literally anything can become a tradeable outcome. This massive expansion means more liquidity and opportunities for sharp bettors, but also attracts casual gamblers who don't understand the fundamentals, potentially creating mispriced markets ripe for exploitation.

articles.title: Kalshi now controls 89% of the U.S. prediction market as regulated trading takes over
articles.summary: Kalshi has captured 89% of the U.S. prediction market share as regulated platforms steamroll the unregulated competition. This dominance signals that traders are abandoning offshore sites for the safety and legitimacy of CFTC oversight, potentially reshaping how Americans bet on everything from elections to economic data.

articles.title: Judge denies Kalshi’s effort to stop Arizona criminal case as federal hurdle awaits
articles.summary: Kalshi failed to convince a judge to halt criminal proceedings in Arizona while the prediction market faces separate federal regulatory challenges. The dual legal battles could severely limit Kalshi's ability to operate and offer political betting markets, potentially opening the door for offshore competitors to capture more US market share.

articles.title: WATCH: Kalshi founders talk insider trading, gambling, Don Jr. on "The Axios Show"
articles.summary: Kalshi's founders appeared on "The Axios Show" to address controversies around insider trading allegations, gambling regulations, and Donald Trump Jr.'s involvement with the platform. The interview likely signals Kalshi's push to legitimize prediction markets amid regulatory scrutiny and public skepticism about whether these platforms are sophisticated forecasting tools or glorified betting sites.

articles.title: Kalshi March Madness Volume Blows Past Election Record
articles.summary: Kalshi's March Madness betting volume just smashed the platform's previous record set during the 2024 election cycle. The numbers prove that sports betting drives more mainstream engagement than political markets, giving prediction market platforms a clear playbook for scaling beyond the political junkies.

articles.title: Polymarket and Kalshi: the new gods of the attention economy
articles.summary: Polymarket and Kalshi have become the new kingmakers of media attention, with their odds driving news cycles and shaping public discourse around everything from elections to pop culture. When prediction markets start dictating what journalists write about and what politicians respond to, they've transcended simple betting platforms to become genuine information infrastructure.

articles.title: Fox integrating Kalshi prediction markets data across news platforms
articles.summary: Fox is embedding Kalshi prediction market odds directly into its news coverage across TV, digital, and other platforms. This marks the first major mainstream media integration of real-time betting data into regular news programming, potentially driving millions of casual viewers to start following and trading on political and news events.

articles.title: Polymarket Rebels Still Betting in Banned Countries Using VPNs
articles.summary: Polymarket users in banned jurisdictions are circumventing geographic restrictions with VPNs to continue placing bets on the platform. This cat-and-mouse game shows how hard it is to enforce geographic betting bans when users really want access, potentially forcing regulators to either crack down harder or rethink their approach entirely.

articles.title: Nobody Knows How to File Taxes on Prediction Market Wins
articles.summary: Prediction market traders are scrambling to figure out how to report their winnings to the IRS, with no clear guidance on whether gains count as gambling income, investment returns, or something else entirely. The tax confusion could scare away casual bettors and create a compliance nightmare that stunts the growth of what's already a niche market.
